notes: monolog/monolog is required at dev-main and resolved from the VCS repository. Its own composer.json declares a branch-alias mapping dev-main -> 3.x-dev in extra.branch-alias. Composer records the package at version 'dev-main' in the lockfile (the raw branch version), not the alias. The alias mapping is stored inside the package entry under extra.branch-alias, NOT in the top-level aliases[] array (that array is reserved for inline root-level aliases such as 'dev-main as 3.x-dev'). Mend should detect monolog/monolog at version dev-main with source type git. psr/log is a transitive pulled from Packagist.

monolog/monolog.version_choice_rationale: The lockfile records version as 'dev-main'. The alias '3.x-dev' is metadata in extra.branch-alias. Mend may report either; the probe asserts dev-main as the canonical lockfile version. If Mend reports 3.x-dev, that is an alias-resolution behavior to document, not necessarily a defect.

psr/log.note: psr/log is a stable release from Packagist, not covered by the VCS repository declaration.

failure_modes_exercised: alias ignored: Mend reports the raw branch name dev-main instead of recognizing the 3.x-dev alias
package not found: dev-main version unrecognized because Mend does not process dev- versions from VCS sources
duplicate entries: one entry for dev-main and one for 3.x-dev appearing as separate packages
source misclassification: monolog/monolog reported as registry instead of git
version swapped: Mend uses alias 3.x-dev as the reported version when lockfile says dev-main
